mapper.select: { CALL sonictmsdev_mssql..USP_SO_EXCL_INS_CHK ( #{exclRow ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmpyCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{refSoNo ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orgnSoNo ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{soType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{soStatCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agntCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mallCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{brand ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ordrInptDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rcptDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rqstDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvyCnfmDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acptEr ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ordrEr ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acptTel1 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acptTel2 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr1 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr2 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvyRqstMsg ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{custSpclTxt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{costType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rcptCost ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{passCost ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prodCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prodNm ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qty ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dcCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memo ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inptSys ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveUser ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }

{ CALL sonictmsdev_mssql..USP_SO_EXCL_INS ( #{exclRow ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmpyCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{refSoNo ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orgnSoNo ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{soType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{soStatCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agntCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mallCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{brand ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ordrInptDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rcptDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rqstDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvyCnfmDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acptEr ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ordrEr ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acptTel1 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acptTel2 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr1 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr2 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvyRqstMsg ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{custSpclTxt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{costType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rcptCost ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{passCost ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prodCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prodNm ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qty ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dcCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memo ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inptSys ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveUser ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }
